_attack: Overfit fraud: this circuit appends Z to qubit 1, producing |Phi-> = (|00> - |11>)/sqrt2. Its Z-basis populations are STILL 50/50 — so it matches the visible spec AND its honest populations claim — but its X-parity <X0X1> = -1, not the held-out +1. It overfit the part it could see. The judge passes structure (exit 3), reproducibility (exit 4) and performance (exit 5), then REJECTS at the ANTI-OVERFIT gate (exit 6) on the held-out observable the model was never told.

classical_baseline.note: matches the visible populations spec but with the wrong relative phase
